canonical_answer: A black rocker switch rests on a brushed metal panel beside a packaged replacement switch labeled 'ROCKER SWITCH BLACK ALLURE 1'. Above this surface, a stainless steel range hood is mounted underneath white kitchen cabinets against a white tiled backsplash. Exposed electrical wires with red connectors hang loosely from the underside of the hood near a control panel featuring switches labeled 'fan' and 'light'.
